summary: This document outlines the behavioral expectations and cultural values for employees within the organization. It contrasts 'good' versus 'bad' employee traits, emphasizing ownership, accountability, communication, and dedication to the company's success. The text serves as a guide for internal team alignment and performance standards.

sniff_test_notes: Emphasizes extreme dedication (e.g., staying up to 3am) which may indicate a high-pressure work environment or potential burnout risks.
